message:
fix(core): enforce max_concurrent workflow limit via atomic lock check

The max_concurrent config parameter was declared but never enforced,
allowing unbounded workflow task spawning under high event rates.

- Add ConcurrencyLimitReached variant to WorkflowStartResult
- Add try_acquire_with_limit() to PaneWorkflowLockManager that
  atomically checks the global lock count AND acquires the pane lock
  under the same mutex, eliminating TOCTOU race conditions
- Add active_count() method for diagnostics
- Wire enforcement into handle_detection() via try_acquire_with_limit
- Add ConcurrencyLimitInfo struct for structured error reporting
- 4 new tests: limit enforcement, limit-vs-pane-conflict priority,
  variant predicates, serde roundtrip

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
